texto: Well, I definitely advise anyone who wants to write, write. Don’t let anyone tell you that you shouldn’t. Don’t let anyone tell you that you can’t. Because a lot of people can be very discouraging to people who say they want to be a professional writer. If you want to do it, then chase it. Chase your dreams. Follow your heart. If that’s what you want, go after it. Write it out. You never know, you could be the next big thing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Helena Lancaster sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Well, I definitely advise anyone who wants to write, write.
